penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line at approximately 3 o'clock position
Slight deviation from marked line at approximately 9 o'clock position

confidence_rationale: Clear view of cutting process and completion time. Deviation measurements estimated from available camera angles - some precision penalties may be slightly over or under actual measurements due to viewing angle limitations.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviations at all cardinal points due to camera perspective
Whether any microscopic tears exist in the gauze material
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth, controlled cutting technique. Completion time of 72 seconds falls well within expert benchmark (60-90s). Minor deviations from marked line result in small penalty.
strengths: Efficient completion time in expert range
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining exact adherence to marked line, particularly at 3 and 9 o'clock positions
Consider slower cutting speed in curved sections to improve precision
